## Summary

Describe the failure mode or repository problem this change addresses.

## Expected behavior change

Explain what should now happen differently and why that behavior is correct.

## Validation

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make review` if playbooks changed
- [ ] `make fixture-check` if fixtures, ranking, or corpus expectations changed

## Notes

Include any sanitized logs, fixture context, or follow-up risks that reviewers should know about.
